hero.intro_paragraph: I focus on Python programming and AI-related projects, building functional applications that bridge mathematical logic and clean web UI.

about.heading: Building Meaningful Digital Experiences
about.paragraph_1: I'm Uday Deore, a B.Tech Computer Science student currently in my second year. I have a strong interest in Python programming and AI-driven workflows. I enjoy learning by doing—building practical utilities like cryptographic tools, expense trackers, and interactive algorithm visualizers.
about.paragraph_2: My core objective is to master Python ecosystem capabilities, exploring data science, machine learning algorithms, and system automation. I believe in continuous optimization, open-source principles, and showcasing projects to exchange knowledge with the developer community.

focus_cards.title: Focus Area
focus_cards.description: Python, C, Streamlit, Algorithms, Data Analysis

projects.title: 🔐 Vigenère Cipher Tool
projects.description: A Python-based cryptographic tool utilizing the Vigenère cipher for interactive text encoding and decoding.

projects.title: 💳 Luhn Validator
projects.description: An interactive validator script that implements the Luhn algorithm to check credit card and identification numbers.

projects.title: 💰 Expense Tracker
projects.description: A modern tracking application enabling users to log, tag, and analyze daily expenses via an interactive dashboard.

projects.title: 📝 Case Converter Utility
projects.description: A utility that parses and converts PascalCase or camelCase formatted strings into clean PEP 8 compliant snake_case.

projects.title: 🧮 Square Root Finder
projects.description: An educational algorithm visualizer calculating numerical square roots to custom decimal positions using the Bisection Method.

projects.title: 🧮 Arithmetic Formatter
projects.description: Neatly reformats multi-line math problems side-by-side with vertical alignment structures and togglable answers.

projects.title: 🔐 Password Generator
projects.description: A randomized key utility that generates customizable, cryptographically strong passwords based on rules.

projects.title: 🧭 Dijkstra Path Finder
projects.description: An interactive graphs visualizer that builds node path flows and calculates shortest distance solutions using Dijkstra's algorithm.

certifications.title: Programming in C
certifications.description: Comprehensive certification covering core C programming syntax, memory management, pointers, and computational algorithms.

certifications.title: Generative AI Mastermind
certifications.description: Mastery in building custom AI-powered utilities, crafting advanced system prompts, and optimizing LLM agents for code generation.

certifications.title: C++ Bootcamp
certifications.description: Intensive Bootcamp covering object-oriented programming concepts in C++, data structures, and runtime efficiency analyses.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have an interesting project proposal or questions about my Python builds? Drop a message below!
contact.text: I'm always open to discuss internship opportunities, custom scripts, algorithmic designs, or system integrations. Let's build something exceptional!
